shortFormVideo.hook: Before you hire a website designer near you in Melbourne FL, ask these four questions.
script: Who owns the domain, hosting, analytics, and design files?
How will the first screen prove local fit and make the next step obvious?
What happens after a lead submits the form?
Where will Search Console and conversion data be reviewed after launch?
